appliedUpdates.description: Added Flow Validator Guidance section for GPU Kernel - final-benchmark surface

notes.VAL-FINAL-001: bench/optimization_final.json confirmed present on LXC (2192 bytes, 14 benchmark categories covering all optimized kernels from sprint)
notes.VAL-FINAL-002: bench/optimization_report.md confirmed present on LXC (8453 bytes). Report shows 5 of 6 areas improved (FA prefill 1.58-1.99x, FP16 GEMM 1.02-1.09x, INT4 GEMM 1.40-2.07x, INT4 GEMV 1.04-1.12x at t4/t8, Elementwise rmsnorm 1.33x). Exceeds the minimum threshold of 3 areas.
notes.VAL-CROSS-001: All 4 non-regression tests passed: test_flash_attn_256.py (6 configs PASS), test_gemm_fp16_prefill.py (6 shapes PASS), test_elementwise.py (SiLU/fused/RoPE PASS), test_gemv_int4.py (2 configs PASS)
notes.VAL-CROSS-002: All 7 new/modified HIP kernel files compiled for gfx906 with hipcc -O3 --offload-arch=gfx906 -std=c++17 exit code 0: flash_attn_256_v3, gemm_fp16_prefill (db variant inside), gemm_int4_prefill_v2, gemv_int4_v4, elementwise_v3, fused_skip_rmsnorm_gemv, gemm_fp16_prefill_silu
